General.Name: Cosmo Lady(China)Holdings Co
General.Description: Cosmo Lady (China) Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the design, research, development, and sale of branded intimate wear products in the People "s Republic of China. It operates in two segments: Intimate Wear Products; and Industrial Projects and Logistic. The company offers bras, underpants, sleepwear and loungewear, and thermal clothes, as well as other products, such as leggings and tights, vests, hosiery, and accessories under the Cosmo Lady, Cosmo Elegance, Cosmo Blossom, Cosmo Esquire, Secret of City Beauty, Ordifen, and Ordifen+ brands. It also develops industrial projects. In addition, the company provides logistics warehousing and distribution; corporate consulting; property management; brand management; and computer technology services. It offers its products through self-managed/cooperative, franchised, and shopping mall stores, as well as e-commerce platform. Cosmo Lady (China) Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Dongguan, China.
